overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial district. The player character navigates towering streets lined with holographic advertisements, crosses intersections, and enters a covered food market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet pavement between towering buildings covered in neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the same direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall dark building with large teal neon 'softsys' signage on the facade
overhanging covered walkway with purple neon strip lighting underneath
large planter with distinctive pink-leaved tree in the center of the street area
bright purple automated vending machines lined along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night, with the camera walking forward between towering commercial buildings. The 'softsys' building looms on the left while a covered walkway with purple neon lights runs along the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead, and various holographic billboards illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and holographic advertisements

events.description: turns right at the intersection, exiting the narrow street into open crosswalk area
crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning right and crossing the wide intersection, passing other pedestrians on the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: black car waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: massive pink holographic projection of a female figure on the building facade
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a wide intersection dominated by a massive pink holographic advertisement on the right building. The ego crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians while a car waits at the junction. The softsys building remains visible on the left but recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with blue neon lighting and high-rise residential towers

events.description: slight acceleration while walking past the blue neon pillars

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street passing blue neon light installations and various storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall vertical blue neon light strips mounted on the left sidewalk
large illuminated teal 'softsys' text sign on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking down a new street lined with distinctive blue neon pillars on the left, the camera passes various holographic storefronts. The softsys building now appears closer on the left with its neon signage clearly visible. A pedestrian with red hair walks past in the opposite direction as the camera approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food market underpass with street vendors

events.description: enters the covered underpass area with food stalls after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the final intersection and entering a covered market area with food stalls

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: covered walkway with green ceiling structure housing multiple food vendors
yellow pedestrian crossing signal box with walk sign illuminated

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses another intersection marked by yellow stripes and enters a covered underpass area. The environment shifts from open neon-lit street to a sheltered food market with green ceiling structures and illuminated menu boards. Several pedestrians are visible browsing the food stalls as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked neon district that transitions from open commercial streets into a sheltered urban market. It begins by moving forward between towering buildings, passing the softsys structure on the left and a purple-lit walkway on the right under the glow of holographic billboards. As the camera turns right, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive pink hologram, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk alongside other pedestrians. The perspective then shifts down a new street lined with blue neon pillars and holographic storefronts, passing a red-haired pedestrian as the softsys building looms closer. Finally, the camera crosses another intersection and enters a covered underpass, where the open city air gives way to a sheltered food market characterized by green ceiling structures and illuminated menu boards.
